responses.nid: You can apply for a National Identity Card by bringing your Citizenship Certificate to the nearest District Administration Office.
responses.citizenship: To apply for Citizenship, you must submit proof of birth in Nepal and your parents' citizenship certificates to your ward office.
responses.passport: Passport applications require an existing NID. Apply through the Department of Passports.
responses.birth: Birth registration should be done at your local ward office within 35 days of birth.
responses.hello: Namaste! I am Smart Sathi. How can I assist you with government services today?
responses.hi: Namaste! I am Smart Sathi. How can I assist you with government services today?
